acceptance_targets: [chapter_01_F003] PASS only if none of the revised lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:183, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:235 uses the pattern "gave a ... laugh/half-smile" and each beat signals a different emotional mechanism. FAIL if the template still appears in 3+ instances.

[chapter_01_F004] PASS only if the revised section between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:247 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:307 includes at least 3 distinct Lena-internal moments (one sensation, one memory/association, one strategic self-assessment) and no uninterrupted run longer than 6 paragraphs without focal interiority. FAIL if a 10+ paragraph interiority gap remains.

[chapter_01_F008] PASS only if revised text between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:253 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:303 replaces at least two abstract governance tokens with concrete operational detail and avoids meta-rhetorical labeling like part-of-speech commentary. FAIL if lexical checklist feel remains.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if none of the revised lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:183, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:235 uses the pattern "gave a ... laugh/half-smile" and each beat signals a different emotional mechanism. FAIL if the template still appears in 3+ instances.
findings.problem: Recurring reaction formula appears 3 times ("X gave a [adjective] laugh/half-smile"), creating a detectable prose tic that flattens character texture.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite reaction beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:183, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:235 with character-specific physical behavior and scene-linked gesture instead of repeating the same construction.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the revised section between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:247 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:307 includes at least 3 distinct Lena-internal moments (one sensation, one memory/association, one strategic self-assessment) and no uninterrupted run longer than 6 paragraphs without focal interiority. FAIL if a 10+ paragraph interiority gap remains.
findings.problem: Interiority drought: the briefing sequence runs 10+ consecutive paragraphs without Lena's internal thought/sensation/self-assessment, so focalized prose slips toward screenplay transcript.
findings.rewrite_direction: Add brief interior beats between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:247 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:287 (not clustered in one spot), tying Clay/Cora dialogue to Lena's bodily stress, memory trigger, and tactical self-check before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:289.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if revised text between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:253 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:303 replaces at least two abstract governance tokens with concrete operational detail and avoids meta-rhetorical labeling like part-of-speech commentary. FAIL if lexical checklist feel remains.
findings.problem: Mechanical repetition from style-bible token reuse: governance abstractions (stability, confidence, institution/control) stack so explicitly that passages read like calibration markers instead of discovered scene language.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework abstraction-heavy lines between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:253 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:303 by replacing repeated governance nouns with concrete administrative acts, and remove or recast meta-label phrasing that explains the rhetoric instead of dramatizing it.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
